conservative.name: Shards of Slaanesh
conservative.requirements:
6 Power
Target within medium range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

success.description: A cloud of razor sharp shards flays your target's body and mind. You hit the target for 6+ Intelligence damage
As above, plus the target draws an insanity from the deck. If it has the Chaos trait, the target suffers from its effects until the end of the current act. Otherwise, discard it

boon.description: If your target is suffering from any insanities, he suffers 1 corruption

bane.description: Such exquisite pain must be shared. You suffer 2 wounds

sigmarsComet.description: After resolving this action, immediately cast the spell again, but vs. Target Discipline (WP) instead. This does not require power to cast. You may only activate this effect once each turn

reckless.name: Shards of Slaanesh
reckless.requirements:
6 Power
Target within medium range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

success.description: A cloud of razor sharp shards flays your target's body and mind. You hit the target for 6+ Intelligence damage
As above, plus the target gains the Weakened condition for 2 rounds

bane.description: Such exquisite pain must be shared. You suffer 2 wounds

sigmarsComet.description: After resolving this action, immediately cast the spell again, but vs. Target Discipline (WP) instead. This does not require power to cast. You may only activate this effect once each turn
